title: Payer Demand Event
description: Emitted by a payer Integration Service API Workflow (primarily payer-apex) when a payer asserts contractual rights that conflict with provider BAA terms. This feeds into the Fiduciary Conflict Detector and drives Reversal 4 — the tri-party HITL gate in Action Center.

source_system.description: The payer Integration Service API Workflow that emits this demand.

payer_id.description: The payer making the demand. Must match vocabulary.stakeholders.payers id.

target_provider_ids.description: Which providers' data the payer is demanding access to or action on.

contractual_basis.description: The payer's stated contractual right (e.g. 'operational visibility clause, section 4.2').

conflicts_with_baa_ids.description: Which BAA ids this demand conflicts with (pre-computed by the API Workflow reading Data Fabric).

maestro_trigger_filter_hint.description: Paste this as the Maestro Trigger FilterTree JSON when wiring this event in Slice 010/012. Routes to edge_qrohED (Regulatory Response → Fiduciary Review) and fires Tri-Party Fiduciary Conflict Review task (tvlKcFYnW).
